assertions.reason: Clicking the real 'Sign in with Google' button on /login did not start a usable Google consent/authentication flow. The browser landed on Google’s OAuth error page showing 'Access blocked: Authorization Error' and 'Missing required parameter: client_id', so no new-user account creation, Google identity linking, callback redirect, onboarding redirect, or session creation could occur.
evidence: Screenshot: foundation/auth-google-oauth/VAL-AUTH-012-login-page.png (login page shows the real 'Sign in with Google' button)
Screenshot: foundation/auth-google-oauth/VAL-AUTH-012-google-error-details.png (Google error details show 'Access blocked: Authorization Error' and 'Missing required parameter: client_id')
Console errors: none observed in agent-browser after the attempt
Cookies after the attempt: authjs.csrf-token, authjs.callback-url, and authjs.pkce.code_verifier present; no authenticated session token cookie observed
Expected auth callback evidence was absent: no successful GET /api/auth/callback/google -> 302 or onboarding redirect was reached because the provider request failed before authentication

assertions.reason: Repeating the real Google sign-in initiation for the existing-user path produced the same Google OAuth error page before any Google account chooser or consent step. Because the provider request failed with 'Missing required parameter: client_id', the app could not authenticate an existing user, link a Google identity, redirect to the dashboard, or create a logged-in session.
evidence: Screenshot: foundation/auth-google-oauth/VAL-AUTH-013-login-page.png (login page shows the real 'Sign in with Google' button before the second attempt)
Screenshot: foundation/auth-google-oauth/VAL-AUTH-012-google-error-details.png (shared error-details evidence: Google reports 'Missing required parameter: client_id')
Console errors: none observed in agent-browser after the second attempt
Cookies after the attempt: authjs.csrf-token, authjs.callback-url, and authjs.pkce.code_verifier present; no authenticated session token cookie observed
Expected auth callback evidence was absent: no successful GET /api/auth/callback/google -> 302 or dashboard redirect was reached because the provider request failed before authentication

notes: The non-interactive environment did not become the limiting factor because the flow failed before any Google account selection or consent UI appeared.

Observed landing URL after clicking the Google button: https://accounts.google.com/signin/oauth/error?authError=********************************************************************************dHBzOi8vZGV2ZWxvcGVycy5nb29nbGUuY29tL2lkZW50aXR5L3Byb3RvY29scy9vYXV0aDIgkAM%3D&flowName=GeneralOAuthLite&client_id&ffgf=1&dsh=S-1106725138:1775034925984859
A second attempt for the existing-user path landed on the same Google OAuth error page with a different dsh value but the same missing client_id failure.
No authenticated Complete Care session was established during either attempt.
